title: equisetum arvense subsp. ramulosum
intro: Equisetum arvense subsp. ramulosum, also known as the Horsetail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family, characterized by its unique, hollow, and jointed stems. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich content of silica and other minerals, which provide various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum arvense subsp. ramulosum include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and various skin conditions, as well as promoting bone health and reducing inflammation. Equisetum arvense subsp. ramulosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its potential to promote wound healing and improve overall well-being.
